1.name: Security & Authentication
1.description: Verified caller identity and security information. (45 points total, all critical)

1.3.description: Verified caller name and account number.

2.name: Professional Communication
2.description: Communicated professionally and managed the call flow effectively. (20 points total)

2.1.description: Maintained a courteous, professional, and respectful tone throughout the interaction.

2.2.description: Demonstrated active listening by acknowledging the caller's concerns and confirming understanding.

2.3.description: Used clear, plain language appropriate to the caller and avoided technical jargon.

2.4.description: Offered the caller the opportunity to participate in a feedback survey.

3.name: Compliance & Service
3.description: Followed compliance requirements, provided accurate information, and delivered quality service. (21 points total)

3.1.description: Protected confidential information and did not release sensitive details outside of established procedures.

3.2.description: Educated the caller on available self-service options and online resources when appropriate.

3.3.description: Potential fraud indicators or caller dissatisfaction detected during the call.
